          (∀ (demand : S.Demand), assigned demand = CT4.assignedPayer S capability input demand) →

  CT4.Graph.ValidTrace S capability input (CT4.ExecutionResult.trace S capability input (CT4.run S capability input))
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT4.run_trace_valid

apiDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} (S : CT4.Spec P) (capability : CT4.Capability S) (input : CT4.Input P),
  ∃ result,
    CT4.RawOutcome.Valid S capability input result.outcome ∧
      CT4.Graph.ValidTrace S capability input (CT4.ExecutionResult.trace S capability input result)
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT4.run_total

apiDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} (S : CT4.Spec P) (capability : CT4.Capability S) (input : CT4.Input P)
  (left right : CT4.ExecutionResult S capability input),
  left = CT4.run S capability input → right = CT4.run S capability input → left = right
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT4.run_deterministic

apiDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} (S : CT4.Spec P) (capability : CT4.Capability S) (input : CT4.Input P)
  (result : CT4.ExecutionResult S capability input),
  result.terminal = CT4.Graph.Terminal.missing ∨
    result.terminal = CT4.Graph.Terminal.overload ∨
      result.terminal = CT4.Graph.Terminal.c4 ∨ result.terminal = CT4.Graph.Terminal.capacity
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT4.outcome_exhaustive
